name: APIs.io (target surface)
description: Proposed robust API → MCP → Agent-Skill buildout for apis.io — a roadmap, not the live contract.

apis.name: APIs.io API (target)
apis.description: The proposed robust surface — 54 operations, 11 MCP prompts, 12 resources, and 10 Agent Skills.

info.title: APIs.io API — target surface (roadmap)
info.description: A ROADMAP for a robust API → MCP (tools + prompts + resources) → Agent-Skill surface for apis.io — the live contract plus proposed additions (tagged Proposed). Rendered by the API Experience tool so the whole target buildout is visible at once. Not the live contract; see https://apis.io/apis.json for what is deployed today.

free.label: Free
free.description: Raw discovery — search, providers, apis, tags, and every artifact-type collection.

pro.label: Pro
pro.description: Curated dimensions, rating data, and synthesis composites.

prompts.name: find_api
prompts.description: Find an API for a task or use case, ranked with links.

prompts.name: explain_artifact
prompts.description: Explain one API artifact and how to use it.

prompts.name: integrate_provider
prompts.description: NEW — Walk through integrating a provider: pull its OpenAPI, onboarding, and auth, then produce concrete first-integration steps.

prompts.name: api_readiness_check
prompts.description: NEW — Assess whether an API is ready to adopt: its artifacts, rating, and what is missing.

prompts.name: design_api_stack
prompts.description: PRO — Design a recommended API stack for a team/domain, exportable as APIs.json.

prompts.name: vendor_shortlist
prompts.description: PRO — Build a scored vendor shortlist for one capability.

prompts.name: audit_api_estate
prompts.description: NEW · PRO — Inventory and score a set of providers, surfacing artifact and governance gaps.

prompts.name: find_alternatives
prompts.description: NEW · PRO — Migration flow: find alternatives to a provider and compare them head to head.

prompts.name: build_agent_toolset
prompts.description: NEW · PRO — For a task or domain, assemble the providers, MCP tools, and skills an agent needs.

prompts.name: track_provider_changes
prompts.description: NEW · PRO — Set up change monitoring for a chosen set of providers.

resources.description: The apis.io llms.txt index for grounding.
NEW — a provider's primary OpenAPI inline, ready to attach.
NEW — a tag brief: linked providers, APIs, neighbors.
NEW · PRO — an industry brief: ranked member providers.
NEW · PRO — a region brief: ranked member providers.
NEW · PRO — a curated area index.
NEW · PRO — a designed capability stack as an attachable APIs.json.
NEW · PRO — the recent catalog-changes feed.
